name: aunion-ai
description: Aunion AI - Korean Lecture Real-time Translation
author: Aunion Team

scripts.setup: npm install --prefix frontend && conda run --no-capture-output -n aunion pip install -r backend/requirements.txt && conda run --no-capture-output -n aunion pip install --force-reinstall torch torchvision torchaudio --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu126 && conda run --no-capture-output -n aunion pip install --force-reinstall "numpy>=1.24.0,<2.0.0" "Pillow>=10.2.0,<11.0.0" && conda run --no-capture-output -n aunion python scripts/download_models.py
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "conda run --no-capture-output -n aunion python backend/run.py" "wait-on http://localhost:8000/health && npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron frontend/."
scripts.electron:build: npm run build --prefix frontend && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json
